queries.question: Give me the mortgage amounts and home equity loan amounts with 30 years of repayment.
queries.sql:
SELECT Mortgages.principalAmount 
FROM Mortgages
WHERE (Mortgages.loanType = "Mortgage" OR Mortgages.loanType = "Home Equity Loan") AND Mortgages.repaymentPeriod = "30"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?principalamount WHERE {
  ?mortgages a :Mortgages .
  ?mortgages p:principalAmount ?principalamount .
  ?mortgages p:loanType ?loantype_w .
  ?mortgages p:loanType ?loantype_w2 .
  ?mortgages p:repaymentPeriod ?repaymentperiod_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?loantype_w) = "Mortgage" || STR(?loantype_w2) = "Home Equity Loan")) && (STR(?repaymentperiod_w) = "30" || STR(?repaymentperiod_w) = "30.0")))
}
